'''Sand burrowers''' were [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] [[Worm/Legends|worms]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Blenjeel]].

==Biology and appearance==
[[File:Worm.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A sand burrower attacking]]
Sand burrowers were large, [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] [[Worm/Legends|worms]] with mottled [[Color/Legends|brown]] carapaces and short [[Limb/Legends|appendages]] running the length of their bodies. Their [[Eye/Legends|eyeless]] heads featured a circular, four-jawed mouth lined with small, inward-pointed [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. Sand burrowers moved close to the surface when traveling underground, as sand was thrashed about as they moved toward prey, and could outrun [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]]. They used ground vibrations to detect prey, emerging from beneath the sand and snatching their victims in their mouths before burrowing underground. However, sand burrowers were not very intelligent, and easily mistook the explosion of a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] or the vibration of a blaster bolt on the sand as a person standing on that spot, which could be used to distract them while the thrower or shooter ran in another direction.<ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Sand burrowers in the galaxy==
Sand burrowers were [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Blenjeel]].<ref name="Jedi Academy" /> In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' dates itself to ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. As ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], including the Battle of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], ''Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy'' must take place in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]].</ref> [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Jaden Korr]] witnessed one swallow a [[Unidentified Blenjeel shipwreck survivor|shipwreck survivor]] and was forced to avoid them as [[Gender/Legends|he]] [[Mission to Blenjeel|searched]] for spare parts to repair his [[Starship/Legends|ship]].<ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
